items.name: Y2K Studded DC Double Rhinestone Scene Belt Black
items.description:
рқ•„рқ•’рқ•ҹрқ•Ә рқ• рқ•Ҙрқ•ҷрқ•–рқ•Ј рқ•Јрқ•–рқ•”рқ• рқ•қрқ• рқ•Јрқ•Ө рқ•’рқ•Јрқ•– рқ•’рқ•§рқ•’рқ•ҡрқ•қрқ•’рқ•“рқ•қрқ•– рқ•ҡрқ•ҹ рқ•һрқ•Ә рқ•ҳрқ•Јрқ• рқ•Ұрқ•Ў!
Join Group = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611

Step into the 2000s McBling era with this bold, studded stacked belt, featuring silver and white rhinestones for the perfect mix of glam and edge. Designed for true Y2K trendsetters, scene queens, and gyaru fashion lovers, this belt is the ultimate black-and-white statement piece. Whether you're rocking a scene or emo aesthetic or adding a touch of vintage luxury to your fit, this belt brings that iconic early 2000s energy. Shine bright, stand out, and own the look!
